name: Cloud Active Defense
description: Cloud active defense lets you deploy decoys right into your cloud applications, putting adversaries into a dilemma: to hack or not to hack? Tool: https://github.com/SAP/cloud-active-defense?tab=readme-ov-file. parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
